name: Trex Acquisition Corp.
summary: Trex Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was engaged in the business of acquiring and developing internet marketing and web site development entities and/or their individual software programs. The company was formerly known as Sync2 Networks Corp. and changed its name to Trex Acquisition Corp. in January 2014. Trex Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2008 and is based in Plantation, Florida.
